task_description: Build the complete FastAPI backend for CLMS with RAG pipeline: Excel parsing, ChromaDB ingestion, LLM-powered legal drafting, HTML/DOCX export. Focus on KHS Material Ketenagalistrikan template. Address review issues: replace regex HTML parser with BeautifulSoup, add API route tests, refactor template routes to eliminate duplication, and commit all work on feat/rag-pipeline-backend branch.
